## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature / new spell
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / internal
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows `type/short-description`
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated (README / governance / spell) if behavior changed
- [ ] No org-specific or personal data introduced (org-token lint passes)
